model_name.description: Exact model name or label used in the report for the U.S. equity return forecast approach.

notes_model.description: Optional extremely short list of key words summarizing the approach.

steps_summary.description: Concise summary of the end-to-end U.S. equity forecast approach.

steps_detailed.description: More detailed summary of the end-to-end U.S. equity forecast approach that explicitly includes all stated assumptions, constraints, and conditions relevant to the U.S. equity return forecast.

variables.description: Flat list of variables, inputs, ensure these are the primary variable and they are used by the model for U.S. equity return forecast.

variables_important.description: Optional list of explicitly important factors mentioned in the report for this approach.

mermaid_diagram.description: Mermaid flowchart showing how initial variables feed intermediary steps or checks and lead to the final U.S. equity return output.

sub_models.description: Optional list of named sub-models or component models mentioned for this extraction target.
